title: Ekam Singh: A Warrior
overview: Ekam Singh is a naughty yet kind-hearted boy who often gets into trouble and struggles with anger. Feeling ignored by his father, he finds guidance in his grandfather, who inspires him with Gurbani and Guru Sahib's Sakhis.
